players.name: Xeebs
matchupItemFlags: no magic resist vs a 4-magical enemy comp

notes: Enemy had 1 healer; only 1 of you carried anti-heal — usually wants two vs a heal comp.
Their main damage was Eden (62k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 4/5 on or near their meta core — they drafted and built optimally; match it.

closingNote: You won the objective count (26–14) and still lost — those leads never became towers/a close. Group and push after each Fangtooth.
draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

notes: DAPJ112389 (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
Willy Guggenheim (support) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
You took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
thefamburgerler (carry) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
Xeebs (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
DAPJ112389 (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
You took Mini Prime in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
Willy Guggenheim (support) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
You took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
thefamburgerler (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-4 into a numbers advantage.
You had the bodies (5v4) and it still went 2-2 — that's a fight you should win with the man up.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Steel. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Enemy is 4/5 magical — one magic-resist item goes a long way.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Wild Rush charge → Ruthless Assault → Highland Hurl slow → Unstoppable Force cleanse ult
ourKits.winCondition: engage Unstoppable and grind with Hersir-empowered swings
ourKits.passive: Hersir stacks empower the next basic
ourKits.playAgainst: save CC for after Unstoppable Force; kite her charge

ourKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
ourKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
ourKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
ourKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
ourKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
ourKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
enemyKits.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
enemyKits.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
enemyKits.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
enemyKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down
